name: engineers-salary-reference
description: Angular frontend for the Engineers Salary Reference.
author: Engineers Salary Reference

scripts.start: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --open
scripts.start:local: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --open
scripts.start:fast: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development-fast --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --open
scripts.start:fast:local: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development-fast --proxy-config proxy.conf.json --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --open
scripts.dev: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --port 4300 --open
scripts.dev:local: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --port 4300 --open
scripts.dev:fast: cross-env CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true NODE_OPTIONS="--max_old_space_size=4096 --max-http-header-size=65536" ng serve --configuration development-fast --proxy-config proxy.local.conf.cjs --poll 200 --watch --hmr --live-reload --port 4300 --open
scripts.start:clean: npm run clean:cache && npm run start
scripts.build:prod:clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:prod
scripts.clean: npm run clean:cache && npm run clean:workspace
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:cache && npm run clean:workspace && npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:modules
scripts.clean:dist: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = 'dist'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { fs.rmSync(path, {recursive: true, force: true}); console.log('dist removed'); }"
scripts.clean:modules: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['node_modules', 'package-lock.json'].forEach(p => { if (fs.existsSync(p)) { fs.rmSync(p, {recursive: true, force: true}); console.log(p + ' removed'); } })"
scripts.analyze: npm run clean:dist && ng build --configuration production --stats-json && npm run verify:deploy-build && webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/engineers-salary-reference/stats.json
scripts.test:e2e:fresh: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=4096 ng build && cross-env PW_PORT=4301 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:cross: cross-env PW_CROSS_BROWSER=1 PW_STATIC_SERVER=1 PW_PORT=4302 playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:mobile: cross-env PW_CROSS_BROWSER=1 PW_MOBILE=1 PW_STATIC_SERVER=1 PW_PORT=4303 playwright test
scripts.clean:e2e: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['test-results','playwright-report'].forEach((p)=>{ if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true }); }); console.log('e2e artifacts cleaned');"
scripts.architecture:check: node scripts/cleanup-root-artifacts.cjs && cross-env STRICT_RUNTIME_NO_PAGES=1 STRICT_LEGACY_ELIMINATION=1 node scripts/architecture-guard.cjs && cross-env STRICT_RUNTIME_NO_PAGES=1 node scripts/pages-runtime-usage-guard.cjs && cross-env STRICT_LEGACY_ELIMINATION=1 node scripts/legacy-elimination-guard.cjs && node scripts/dependency-layer-guard.cjs
scripts.verify:quick: npm run check:eslint-ecosystem && npm run architecture:check && npm run architecture:health && npm run complexity-report && npm run type-safety:guard && npm run docs:lint && npm run typecheck:strict:stage-a && npm run typecheck:strict:stage-b && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test -- --watch=false && npm run build:prod && npm run verify:deploy-build && npm run security:audit && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const npmCmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; spawnSync(npmCmd, ['outdated', '--depth=0'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(0);"
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:quick && npm run docs:build && npm run storybook:build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:cross && npm run test:e2e:mobile && npm run clean:e2e && npm run build:prod && npm run verify:deploy-build
